name: GOLFTEC Lakeside
about: GOLFTEC provides a technology-driven golf instruction and fitting experience. The company utilizes advanced systems like OPTIMOTION motion tracking, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to deliver data-backed coaching. Lessons and fittings are designed to be personalized and structured around clear improvement goals, ranging from beginner fundamentals to advanced game refinement.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven lessons using advanced motion tracking technology for precise feedback
Personalized improvement plans created by certified PGA coaches
Comprehensive club fitting services with launch monitor optimization

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is recommended to bring your own golf clubs for lessons and practice sessions. GOLFTEC also offers club fitting services if you are looking for new equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services, so it is best to assume outside food and drinks are not available on-site. You may want to contact the center directly to confirm their policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes on a simulator is typically faster than on a real course and generally takes around 2 to 3 hours depending on the simulator software and number of players in your group.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth, making it a suitable environment for children looking to learn and improve their golf skills.
